parameters-en.Time: Adjusts the length of time before the first repeat. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Feedback: Feedback controls the number of delay repeats. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard. At high values, the delay taps may begin to self-oscillate and squeal (perhaps in a good way).
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the repeats, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the repeats, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay repeats and the dry signal. At 0%, no repeats are heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Filter: Selects the type of filter applied to the repeats--Low Pass (High Cut), Band Pass, or High Pass (Low Cut).
parameters-en.Shape: Selects the wave shape of the filter modulation applied to the repeats.
parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the modulation applied to the repeats. When set to 0.0, Rate freezes the current filter frequency.
parameters-en.StartFreq: Sets the lowest frequency in the sweep modulation.
parameters-en.Range: Determines how high the modulation sweeps.
parameters-en.Resonance: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filters.
parameters-en.DutyCycle: Alters the modulation wave shape in differing ways. For example, when Shape is set to "Triangle," 50% is a normal triangle wave and extreme values warp the wave toward a saw down (0%) or saw up (100%) shape. Or with Sine, 50% is a normal sine wave and extreme values warp the wave toward a parabolic down (0%) or parabolic up (100%) shape.
parameters-en.Scale: For stereo delays, the right side's time is always some percentage of the left sides's time, and is determined by the Scale parameter. For example, if Time is set to 500 ms, and Scale is set to 70%, the left delay is 500 ms and the right delay is 350ms (or 70% of 500 ms). When scale is set to 100%, left and right delays are the same.
parameters-en.Spread: Subtly controls the apparent stereo width of the modulation.
parameters-en.Headroom: Provides up to 12.0 dB of additional headroom.
